_provenance: Claude-authored original Zhongkao-level 语法填空 (gblanks shape, 10 blanks each), batch G4. Topics distinct from G1-G3; points rotate over tense/preposition/article/pronoun/comparative-superlative/word-form/connector/subject-verb agreement/non-finite. Dialogue single-quoted. DeepSeek not used.

sets.passage: My hometown is a small but beautiful town (1)____ the south of China. It is famous (2)____ its green hills and clear rivers. When I was young, I often (3)____ (swim) in the river with my friends. The people there are friendly, and life is much (4)____ (slow) than in big cities. In recent years, my hometown (5)____ (change) a lot. New roads and schools (6)____ (build) everywhere. Although it is more modern now, it still keeps (7)____ (it) natural beauty. Every time I go back, I feel (8)____ (relax) and happy. My grandmother says that no place is (9)____ comfortable as home. I love my hometown, and I hope it will become even (10)____ (good) in the future.

gblanks.hint: past tense, when I was young

sets.explain_zh: (1) in the south；(2) famous for；(3) when I was young 过去 swam；(4) slower 比较级；(5) in recent years 现在完成 has changed；(6) have been built 现在完成被动；(7) its 物主；(8) relaxed 感受形容词；(9) as...as；(10) better 比较级。

sets.passage: The Dragon Boat Festival is a traditional Chinese festival (1)____ falls in summer. People hold it (2)____ remember an ancient poet named Qu Yuan. On that day, families eat zongzi, (3)____ are made of rice and wrapped in leaves. The most exciting part is the dragon boat race, (4)____ many teams take part. Each team rows (5)____ (fast) than the others to win. The drums beat loudly, and the crowd cheers with (6)____ (excite). My grandmother makes the (7)____ (delicious) zongzi I have ever tasted. Last year, I helped her wrap them, but mine looked very (8)____ (ugly). She laughed and said practice (9)____ (make) perfect. This festival teaches us never (10)____ (forget) our history and culture.
sets.explain_zh: (1) which/that 指物；(2) to remember 目的；(3) which 非限定指物；(4) where/in which 引导(比赛中)；(5) faster 比较级；(6) excitement 名词；(7) the most delicious 最高级；(8) ugly 形容词；(9) practice makes 主谓一致；(10) never to forget。

sets.passage: Last week, our science teacher showed us an interesting (1)____ (experiment). She put an egg into a glass of salt water, and the egg did not (2)____ (sink). We were all surprised, and everyone asked (3)____ this happened. The teacher explained that salt water is (4)____ (heavy) than fresh water. Then she let each of us (5)____ (try) it ourselves. My partner and I worked together (6)____ (careful). It was the first time that I (7)____ (see) science in such a fun way. After class, I could not stop (8)____ (think) about it. Now I understand that science is all (9)____ us in daily life. I hope I (10)____ become a scientist one day.

gblanks.hint: past perfect, the first time that ...

sets.explain_zh: (1) an experiment 单数；(2) did not sink 原形；(3) asked why；(4) heavier 比较级；(5) let sb try；(6) carefully 副词；(7) the first time that 过去完成 had seen；(8) stop thinking 停止做；(9) all around us；(10) 将来 will。

sets.passage: Last summer, my friends and I started a small lemonade stand (1)____ the street. We wanted to earn some money (2)____ (buy) gifts for our parents. Every morning, we made fresh lemonade and sold (3)____ to the people passing by. At first, business was slow, and we sold (4)____ (few) than ten cups a day. But we did not give up. We made a big colourful sign, and soon (5)____ (many) customers came. My friend Lily was the (6)____ (good) at talking to people. By the end of the holiday, we (7)____ (earn) enough money for the gifts. Our parents were very proud (8)____ us. This experience taught me that hard work always (9)____ (pay) off. I will never forget that (10)____ (success) summer.

gblanks.hint: by the end of, past perfect

sets.explain_zh: (1) on the street；(2) to buy 目的；(3) sold it 宾格；(4) fewer 比较级；(5) more customers；(6) the best 最高级；(7) by the end of 过去完成 had earned；(8) proud of；(9) hard work pays 主谓一致；(10) successful 形容词。

sets.passage: My favourite writer is a woman (1)____ books are loved by children all over the world. I have read almost all of (2)____ stories. Her words are simple, (3)____ they are full of warmth and wisdom. The first book of hers that I read (4)____ (be) about a lonely little fox. It moved me so deeply (5)____ I cried at the end. Since then, reading her books (6)____ (become) my favourite hobby. I think a good story can teach us more than a (7)____ (thousand) lessons. Last month, I wrote a letter to her, and I hope she (8)____ reply soon. One day, I want to write stories (9)____ (good) than hers. She has shown me how (10)____ (powerful) words can be.
sets.explain_zh: (1) whose books；(2) her stories 物主；(3) 转折 but；(4) the first book was 过去；(5) so...that；(6) reading...has become 现在完成；(7) a thousand 不加 s；(8) 将来 will；(9) better 比较级；(10) how powerful 形容词。

sets.passage: Two years ago, I failed an important maths exam, and I felt very (1)____ (sad). I almost believed that I was not good (2)____ maths at all. My teacher noticed this and talked (3)____ me kindly. 'Failure is the mother of success,' she said. From that day on, I studied (4)____ (hard) than before. I did a little maths every evening, (5)____ slowly my marks went up. Last term, I got the (6)____ (high) score in my class. My classmates asked me what the secret (7)____ (be). I told them that the secret was never (8)____ (give) up. Now I am no longer afraid (9)____ difficult problems. This experience has made me (10)____ (strong) than ever.
sets.explain_zh: (1) sad 形容词；(2) good at；(3) talk to sb；(4) harder 比较级；(5) 结果 and；(6) the highest 最高级；(7) what the secret was 过去；(8) never to give up；(9) afraid of；(10) stronger 比较级。

sets.passage: Healthy eating is very important (1)____ growing children. Doctors say that we should eat more vegetables and (2)____ (little) junk food. Breakfast is the most important meal (3)____ the day, so we should never skip it. My mother always tells me that an apple a day (4)____ (keep) the doctor away. In the past, I loved drinking cola, (5)____ now I prefer water and fresh juice. Eating too much sugar is bad (6)____ our teeth. If we want (7)____ (stay) healthy, we must also do exercise every day. Last year, I changed my eating habits, and I feel much (8)____ (good) now. A balanced diet helps us grow (9)____ (tall) and stronger. Remember, health is the (10)____ (rich) treasure in life.
sets.explain_zh: (1) important for/to；(2) less junk food 比较级；(3) meal of the day；(4) an apple keeps 主谓一致；(5) 转折 but；(6) bad for；(7) want to stay；(8) better 比较级；(9) taller 比较级；(10) the richest 最高级。

sets.passage: My grandmother is the best cook (1)____ I know. Every Sunday, our whole family (2)____ (gather) at her home for lunch. The kitchen is always full (3)____ wonderful smells. Her best dish is fish soup, (4)____ tastes better than any restaurant's. She has cooked for our family (5)____ more than forty years. 'The secret is love,' she often (6)____ (say) with a smile. When I was little, I loved (7)____ (watch) her cook. Now she is teaching me how (8)____ (make) some simple dishes. I think cooking is one of the (9)____ (useful) skills in life. I hope that one day my food will be as delicious (10)____ hers.
sets.explain_zh: (1) the best cook that；(2) whole family gathers 主谓一致；(3) full of；(4) which/that 指物；(5) for forty years；(6) she says 主谓一致；(7) love watching/to watch；(8) how to make；(9) the most useful 最高级；(10) as delicious as。

sets.passage: Last winter, I took my first flight to visit my uncle in Beijing. I was both nervous (1)____ excited. When the plane took (2)____, I held my mother's hand tightly. Soon we were flying high above the (3)____ (cloud). Everything on the ground looked so (4)____ (small) that the cars were like tiny ants. A kind flight attendant brought us some food and asked if we (5)____ (need) anything. The flight was much (6)____ (smooth) than I had expected. After two hours, the plane landed (7)____ (safe) at the airport. My uncle was already waiting (8)____ us outside. It was the most exciting day of my whole (9)____ (holiday). Now I am not afraid of flying any more, and I cannot wait (10)____ (take) another flight.
sets.explain_zh: (1) both...and；(2) take off；(3) above the clouds 复数；(4) so small that 形容词；(5) asked if we needed 过去；(6) smoother 比较级；(7) safely 副词；(8) wait for；(9) my whole holiday；(10) cannot wait to take。

sets.passage: A new term has just begun, and I feel full (1)____ energy and hope. This year, I (2)____ (make) a plan to improve myself. First, I will get up (3)____ (early) than last term so that I have time to read. Our class has a new English teacher (4)____ comes from another city. Everyone says her lessons are very (5)____ (interest). I have also decided (6)____ (join) the school choir, because I love singing. My parents told me that good habits (7)____ (be) the key to success. I know the new term will not always be easy, (8)____ I am ready to work hard. I want to make this term the (9)____ (good) one ever. With effort and patience, I believe I (10)____ achieve my goals.
sets.explain_zh: (1) full of；(2) have made 现在完成；(3) earlier 比较级；(4) who/that 指人；(5) interesting 形容词；(6) decide to join；(7) good habits are 主谓一致；(8) 转折 but；(9) the best one 最高级；(10) 将来 will。
